glosses.ja: 滑空する; ホバリングする

sentences.target: Le rapace plane au-dessus des falaises.

translations.fr: Le rapace plane au-dessus des falaises.
translations.en: The bird of prey is gliding above the cliffs.
translations.es: El ave rapaz planea sobre los acantilados.
translations.de: Der Greifvogel gleitet über den Klippen.
translations.it: Il rapace plana sopra le scogliere.
translations.pt: A ave de rapina plana sobre as falésias.
translations.vi: Chim săn mồi đang lượn trên những vách đá.
translations.nl: De roofvogel zweeft boven de kliffen.
translations.hu: A ragadozó madár a sziklák fölött siklik.
translations.hi: शिकारी पक्षी चट्टानों के ऊपर मँडरा रहा है.
translations.el: Το αρπακτικό πουλί αιωρείται πάνω από τους γκρεμούς.
translations.id: Burung pemangsa meluncur di atas tebing.
translations.ro: Pasărea de pradă planează deasupra stâncilor.
translations.ja: 猛禽が崖の上空を滑空している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiners the noun 'rapace' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'rapace' and denotes gliding flight.
Compound adverb of spatial location; takes a 'de' complement, introducing the PP that follows.
Prepositional contraction ('de' + 'les'); heads the prepositional complement to 'au-dessus' while incorporating the definite article.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'des' in the PP.

sentences.target: Je plane un peu après ce concert.
sentences.reading: /ʒə plan œ̃ pø a.pʁɛ sə kɔ̃.sɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je plane un peu après ce concert.
translations.ipa: /ʒə plan œ̃ pø a.pʁɛ sə kɔ̃.sɛʁ/
translations.en: I'm still floating a bit after that concert.
translations.es: Sigo en una nube después de ese concierto.
translations.de: Ich schwebe noch ein bisschen nach diesem Konzert.
translations.it: Sono ancora un po' sulle nuvole dopo quel concerto.
translations.ko: 그 콘서트 이후로 아직 좀 붕 떠 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那场演出后我还有点飘。
translations.yue: 嗰場音樂會之後我仲有啲飄飄然。
translations.ru: Я всё ещё немного на подъёме после того концерта.
translations.pt: Ainda estou nas nuvens depois daquele concerto.
translations.he: אני עדיין קצת מרחף אחרי ההופעה ההיא.
translations.tr: O konserden sonra hâlâ biraz havadayım.
translations.vi: Sau buổi hòa nhạc đó tôi vẫn còn lâng lâng một chút.
translations.ar: ما زلت أشعر ببعض الخفة بعد ذلك الحفل.
translations.nl: Ik zweef nog een beetje na dat concert.
translations.uk: Я досі трохи на піднесенні після того концерту.
translations.hu: Még egy kicsit a koncert után is a felhőkön járok.
translations.hi: उस कॉन्सर्ट के बाद मैं अभी भी थोड़ा सा मगन हूँ.
translations.pl: Wciąż trochę unoszę się po tamtym koncercie.
translations.el: Ακόμα αιωρούμαι λίγο μετά από εκείνη τη συναυλία.
translations.nb: Jeg svever fortsatt litt etter den konserten.
translations.id: Saya masih agak melayang setelah konser itu.
translations.sv: Jag svävar fortfarande lite efter den konserten.
translations.ro: Încă plutesc puțin după concertul acela.
translations.cs: Po tom koncertě se ještě trochu vznáším.
translations.da: Jeg svæver stadig lidt efter den koncert.
translations.fi: Olen yhä hieman huumaantunut sen konsertin jälkeen.
translations.ja: あのコンサートの後もまだ少し浮かれている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'plane'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; here used figuratively (feeling high/spacey).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'peu' in the quantifier phrase.
Quantifying noun; head of the fixed phrase 'un peu' functioning adverbially to modify the verb.
Preposition introducing the temporal PP 'après ce concert'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'concert'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

translations.en: A nice smell still hangs in the air.
translations.es: Un buen aroma aún permanece en el aire.
translations.de: Ein guter Duft liegt noch in der Luft.
translations.it: Un buon profumo è ancora nell'aria.
translations.ko: 좋은 냄새가 아직도 공기 중에 맴돈다.
translations.zh-Hans: 空气中仍然弥漫着一股好闻的香味。
translations.yue: 空氣入面仲瀰漫住陣陣香味。
translations.ru: Приятный запах всё ещё витает в воздухе.
translations.pt: Um bom cheiro ainda paira no ar.
translations.tr: Hoş bir koku hâlâ havada asılı duruyor.
translations.vi: Một mùi thơm dễ chịu vẫn còn vương trong không khí.
translations.ar: رائحة طيبة ما زالت عالقة في الهواء.
translations.nl: Een lekkere geur hangt nog in de lucht.
translations.uk: Приємний запах досі витає в повітрі.
translations.hu: Egy jó illat még mindig a levegőben lebeg.
translations.hi: हवा में अभी भी अच्छी खुशबू बनी हुई है.
translations.pl: Przyjemny zapach wciąż unosi się w powietrzu.
translations.el: Ένα ωραίο άρωμα αιωρείται ακόμα στον αέρα.
translations.nb: En god lukt henger fortsatt i luften.
translations.id: Aroma harum masih menggantung di udara.
translations.sv: En god doft ligger fortfarande i luften.
translations.ro: Un miros plăcut încă plutește în aer.
translations.cs: Příjemná vůně se stále vznáší ve vzduchu.
translations.da: En god duft hænger stadig i luften.
translations.ja: 心地よい香りがまだ空気の中に漂っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'odeur'.
Adjective, feminine singular; pre-nominal modifier of 'odeur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'plane'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; metaphorical use (a smell hanging in the air).
Adverb modifying 'plane' to indicate continuation.

translations.ja: パラグライダーが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (elided form of 'je' before vowel-initial verb); 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'aime'; denotes the activity.
Preposition marking manner/means; introduces the PP 'en parapente'.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'en'; denotes the sport/equipment used.
